sigWerErrors.reason: 'el agente' (the agent) was changed to 'la gente' (the people), which changes the subject of the sentence and alters the meaning significantly.
The insertion of 'una' before 'para el aumento' is a minor grammatical error and does not change the overall meaning of the sentence.
'el limite' (the limit) was changed to 'mi limite' (my limit), which personalizes the statement but does not significantly alter the intent or meaning.
'de la tarjeta' (of the card) vs. 'en la tarjeta' (on the card) is a minor prepositional change that does not affect the overall meaning.
